Classes

class  CLParser
 Abstract base for all command-line option parsers. More...
 
class  CLOption< T >
 Typed option expecting a value (e.g., "-th 8", "-l 2"). More...
 
class  CLStringOption
 Option that captures a string argument. More...
 
class  CLFlag
 Boolean flag option with no argument. More...
 

Detailed Description

Minimal command-line argument parsing utilities.

This header defines a small hierarchy of parser classes to simplify reading options from main (int argc, char* argv[]). It supports:

  • Templated options bound to user variables (CLOption<T>)
  • String options (CLStringOption) that may include spaces
  • Flags (CLFlag) that simply toggle a boolean when present
